# Copy Templates for StableStream

Use these templates as starting points for different content types. Adapt the placeholders and examples to fit your specific use case.

---

## Hero Sections (Landing Page)

### Template 1: Benefit-First for Retail
```
[HEADLINE - 1 sentence, benefit-focused]
Your liquidity works 24/7. Even when out of range.

[SUBHEADING - 2 sentences, mechanism + CTA setup]
Out-of-range Uniswap positions waste capital. StableStream automatically routes idle USDC to Compound or Aave, earning real yield while your position stays safe. Set it up in minutes.

[CTA]
Connect Wallet
```

**Use when:** Targeting retail users who want to understand the benefit first, then the how.

---

### Template 2: Efficiency-First for Institutions
```
[HEADLINE - 1 sentence, value proposition]
Institutional capital efficiency for Uniswap v4.

[SUBHEADING - 2–3 sentences, mechanism + trust signals]
Automatically route out-of-range liquidity to verified yield sources using trustless on-chain validation. Our Risk Engine prevents manipulation; Reactive Network ensures decentralized monitoring. No keeper bots. No counterparty risk.

[CTA]
Explore Architecture
```

**Use when:** Targeting institutional LPs evaluating capital efficiency gains.

---

### Template 3: Developer/Partner Pitch
```
[HEADLINE - 1 sentence, architectural focus]
Native Uniswap v4 yield routing infrastructure.

[SUBHEADING - 2 sentences, capability + extensibility]
StableStream's hook architecture integrates directly with Uniswap v4 lifecycle. Build custom yield strategies, extend adapters to new protocols, and access composable position data on-chain.

[CTA]
View Docs / Integrate
```

**Use when:** Targeting developers, protocols, or integration partners.

---

## Feature Descriptions

### Template 1: Benefit-Mechanism-Proof Structure
```
[BENEFIT - 1 sentence, what the user gains]
Earn passive yield on your out-of-range liquidity with zero manual management.

[MECHANISM - 1–2 sentences, how it works]
When your Uniswap position exits range, StableStream's Reactive Network monitors the event and autonomously routes idle capital to Aave V3 or Compound V3. Your funds return when your position re-enters range.

[PROOF/TRUST - 1 sentence, why you can trust it]
All routing decisions are validated by our on-chain Risk Engine, preventing manipulation and ensuring real APY before capital deployment.
```

**Use for:** Feature deep-dives on landing page, documentation, or emails.

---

### Template 2: Short Form (1–2 sentences)
```
[BENEFIT + MECHANISM fused]
Earn [SPECIFIC APY] on USDC when your Uniswap position exits range — no buttons to click, no manual rebalancing required.
```

**Example:**
"Earn Compound's 2.8% on USDC when out of range — no buttons to click, handled automatically."

**Use for:** Social media, one-liners, CTAs, component tooltips.

---

## Value Propositions by Audience

### For Retail Users
```
[PROBLEM]
Your out-of-range Uniswap positions earn zero yield and tie up capital.

[SOLUTION]
StableStream automatically routes idle USDC to Aave or Compound while your position waits.

[OUTCOME]
Passive income, no extra work, real APY (2.8–3.2%).

[CTA PHRASE]
"Set it and forget it."
```

---

### For Institutions
```
[PROBLEM]
Concentrated liquidity capital efficiency vs. complexity tradeoff. Manual rebalancing reduces net returns.

[SOLUTION]
Autonomous, trustless routing via Reactive Network + on-chain Risk Engine. Institutional-grade capital deployment.

[OUTCOME]
Better net returns, eliminated downtime, full transparency and auditability.

[CTA PHRASE]
"Capital efficiency without compromise."
```

---

### For Developers
```
[PROBLEM]
Building yield strategies requires custom oracle integrations, keeper bot infrastructure, or reliance on centralized sources.

[SOLUTION]
Extend StableStream's hook architecture on Uniswap v4. Fine-grained event monitoring via Reactive Network. Pluggable adapters for new protocols.

[OUTCOME]
Faster time to market, composable infrastructure, trustless execution.

[CTA PHRASE]
"Build on proven infrastructure."
```

---

## Email Subject Lines & Openers

### Retail-Focused
- **Subject:** "Earn 2.8% on Idle USDC (Starting Today)"
  **Opener:** Most of your Uniswap positions sit out of range earning zero. Here's how to fix that.

- **Subject:** "Your Liquidity Can Work Harder"
  **Opener:** Out-of-range capital doesn't have to be dead weight.

### Institutional-Focused
- **Subject:** "[New Feature] Dynamic Fees & Trustless APY Validation"
  **Opener:** Introducing Risk Engine v1.1 — institutional-grade safeguards against on-chain manipulation.

---

## Social Media Posts

### Twitter/X (Retail)
```
Out-of-range Uniswap positions miss 100% of the yield they don't earn.

StableStream changes that.

Earn Compound's 2.8% or Aave's 3.2% on USDC—automatically routed when you're out of range.

No buttons. No risk. Just yield.

[CTA: Connect Wallet]
```

### Twitter/X (Institutional)
```
Capital efficiency meets institutional rigor.

Trustless, autonomous routing. Reactive Network monitoring. On-chain Risk Engine validation. No keeper bots. No counterparty risk.

Welcome to Uniswap v4 infrastructure built for scale.

[CTA: Read Docs]
```

### LinkedIn (Hire/Partnership)
```
Excited to announce [Partnership Name] integrates StableStream's yield routing architecture.

Together, we're bringing institutional-grade capital efficiency to DeFi—trustless routing, real yields, zero intermediaries.

Learn how: [link]
```

---

## CTAs by Engagement Level

| Friction Level | Phrase | Use Case |
|---|---|---|
| **Ultra-low** | "Connect Wallet" | Hero landing page (first touchpoint) |
| **Low** | "Start Earning" | Feature description, email CTA |
| **Medium** | "Explore Now" | Educational content, blog post |
| **Higher** | "Read the Docs" | Developer docs, integration guide |
| **Highest** | "Schedule a Call" | Institutional partnerships |

---

## Sentence Starters (British-English Professional Tone)

Start your paragraphs with these to maintain professional voice:

- "StableStream autonomously routes..."
- "Your out-of-range liquidity..."
- "Earn real yield through..."
- "Institutional-grade risk controls ensure..."
- "No buttons to click. Just..."
- "Capital efficiency without compromise..."
- "Trustless on-chain validation..."

---

## Copy Checklist Before Publishing

- [ ] **Benefit first?** Lead with outcome, not mechanism (except for institutional copy)
- [ ] **Autonomous/automatic mentioned?** Core differentiator—emphasize set-and-forget
- [ ] **Real numbers where possible?** Use Compound 2.8%, Aave 3.2%, not generic "boost yields"
- [ ] **Risk language appropriate?** No "guaranteed", "risk-free", or unqualified claims
- [ ] **Tone matches audience?** Retail = simple + friendly; Institution = technical + credible; Developer = architectural
- [ ] **No hype?** Avoid "moon", "lambo", "best", "perfect" unless backed by specific claims
- [ ] **Call-to-action clear?** Button/link text is action-oriented (verb + noun)
- [ ] **Accessible?** Technical terms explained for retail; detailed for institutional
- [ ] **Accurate?** Features, APY, mechanisms reflect actual product
- [ ] **On-brand?** Matches professional, utility-focused identity

---

*Templates are starting points—customize based on your specific campaign, target audience segment, and feature focus.*
